expectation: Literal book and chapter headings should stay ahead of incidental citations.
The established phrase should rank ahead of loose طلب and علم co-occurrences.
The noun phrase about hadith sciences should not expand as every use of the roots علم and حدث.
Past and present forms of the same verb should gain recall without changing the leading literal results.
Past and present forms of the same verb should gain recall without changing the leading literal results.
Useful nominal variation should match while the literal phrase remains dominant.
CAMeL root placeholders must not be passed through Lucene tokenization or turn a narrow phrase into a corpus-wide match.
The plural مسؤوليات should share a lemma with مسؤولية without root expansion.
Plural forms should connect to their singular lemmas without broad root matching.
Singular and plural water queries should return substantially compatible leading results.
Verb morphology should help without conflating unrelated analyses of يصح.
A classical phrase should preserve its literal match even when the MSA model selects weak unigram analyses.
Alef normalization should not require morphological or root expansion.
A plural noun should retrieve its singular lemma while preserving literal plural matches first.
Singular and plural forms should be connected through the lemma rather than an incomplete root.
A highly ambiguous surface form should not silently become an unrestricted root search.
Inflected verbs should connect to their lemma without matching every derivation of the root كتب.
The noun كتاب should not be treated as equivalent to every word derived from كتب.
Plural good deeds should connect to حسنة without allowing the ambiguous حسن analysis to outrank literal matches.
A near-tied second CAMeL lemma should recover plural good deeds while the ambiguous حسن family remains only a low-weight recall tail.
An MLE backoff analysis must not replace the surface query; missing lemma recall should remain visible in the benchmark.
The rare dual form should keep its literal pages first, then retrieve useful فتوى-family passages.
The rare dual should connect to جماعة after the small literal result set without root-level noise.
The rare plural should connect to ابتداء and provide relevant first-page recall after literal matches.
